case_title: FIRST EAGLE DELIVERY VS. THE PACKAGING STORE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE PACKAGING STORE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2015 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-23-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ARTURO TORRES---ACCOUNT RECEIVABLES MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM TRAVIS--EMPLOYEE. DEFENDANT HAS FILED BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT AND STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY TO AUG-16-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE ORDER OF THE COURT ISSUED AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 2/23/16. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FIRST EAGLE DELIVERY OR THE PACKAGING STORE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
